summary: Iteration 10 - Risk Appetite Questionnaire Feature Testing. Backend APIs 100% PASS (10/10 tests). Frontend Invest screen displays correctly with Risk Profile section showing Moderate profile (3.2/5), all 10 breakdown category bars, Balanced Growth Strategy allocation, and working Retake modal with 12-question flow.
critical_code_review_comments: Risk profile CRUD endpoints working correctly with proper auth
AI chat context correctly includes risk profile data in responses
Score calculation and category breakdown working as expected
Profile replacement on retake working (deletes old, saves new)
seed_data_creation: Moderate risk profile saved via backend tests with full 12-question assessment
context_for_next_testing_agent: Risk Profile feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/risk-profile (save), GET /api/risk-profile (retrieve). Frontend shows profile badge, score, breakdown bars, strategy allocation. Modal has 12 questions with categories: horizon, loss_tolerance, experience, income_stability, emergency_fund, return_expectation, concentration, behavior, goal_priority, age_capacity. Login automation requires localStorage token injection for React Native Web.

Backend.POST /api/risk-profile: PASS - Saves risk profile with answers, score, profile, breakdown
Backend.GET /api/risk-profile: PASS - Returns saved risk profile with all fields
Backend.GET /api/risk-profile (no profile): PASS - Returns null for new user
Backend.AI chat context: PASS - Includes risk profile in AI response context
Backend.Profile replacement: PASS - Replaces existing profile on retake
Backend.Auth required: PASS - All endpoints return 401 without token

Frontend.Risk Profile section: PASS - Shows Moderate badge with 3.2/5 score
Frontend.Breakdown bars: PASS - All 10 categories displayed with scores
Frontend.Risk modal progress: PASS - Shows '1 of 12' with progress bar
Frontend.Risk modal category: PASS - Shows category label (e.g., INVESTMENT HORIZON)
Frontend.Strategy section: PASS - Shows Balanced Growth Strategy with allocation bar
Frontend.Strategy allocation: PASS - Shows Equity 40%, Debt 30%, Gold 15%, Alt 15%
